title: TPL: Parallel.For/ForEach и degree of parallelism
note: The card questions show natural Parallel.For/ForEach code. The `code` below invokes the SAME Parallel methods via reflection because the Roslyn CSharpScript sandbox (/api/authoring/run-csharp) does not reference System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel.dll for direct top-level compilation; the type executes identically to a compiled `dotnet` project, so the expectedOutput is the real, deterministic stdout of a real Parallel run.

cards.prompt: Parallel.For(1, 101, ...) iterates i = 1..100 (upper bound exclusive); with Interlocked.Add the sum is the deterministic 5050
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; using System.Threading; var pType = Type.GetType("System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel, System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel"); long sum = 0; Action<int> body = i => Interlocked.Add(ref sum, i); var mi = pType.GetMethod("For", new[]{ typeof(int), typeof(int), typeof(Action<int>) }); mi.Invoke(null, new object[]{ 1, 101, body }); Console.WriteLine($"sum={sum}");

cards.prompt: Parallel.ForEach runs the body once per element over the whole source; with an atomic counter the count is exactly 1000
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; using System.Threading; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; var pType = Type.GetType("System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel, System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel"); var src = Enumerable.Range(1,1000).ToArray(); int processed = 0; Action<int> body = x => Interlocked.Increment(ref processed); var open = pType.GetMethods().First(m => m.Name=="ForEach" && m.IsGenericMethodDefinition && m.GetParameters().Length==2 && m.GetParameters()[1].ParameterType.IsGenericType && m.GetParameters()[1].ParameterType.GetGenericTypeDefinition()==typeof(Action<>)); open.MakeGenericMethod(typeof(int)).Invoke(null, new object[]{ src, body }); Console.WriteLine($"processed={processed}");

cards.prompt: MaxDegreeOfParallelism = 1 caps concurrency at one, so a Parallel.For over 20 iterations runs on a single thread (distinctThreads=1)
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; using System.Threading; using System.Collections.Generic; var pType = Type.GetType("System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel, System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel"); var optType = Type.GetType("System.Threading.Tasks.ParallelOptions, System.Threading.Tasks.Parallel"); var opts = Activator.CreateInstance(optType); optType.GetProperty("MaxDegreeOfParallelism").SetValue(opts, 1); var seen = new HashSet<int>(); object gate = new object(); Action<int> body = i => { lock(gate){ seen.Add(Thread.CurrentThread.ManagedThreadId); } }; var mi = pType.GetMethod("For", new[]{ typeof(int), typeof(int), optType, typeof(Action<int>) }); mi.Invoke(null, new object[]{ 0, 20, opts, body }); Console.WriteLine($"distinctThreads={seen.Count}");
